description: Loket-native incarnation of Mr.Flow. Reaches every capability through the single kernel counter call(cap,args). Built alongside the legacy mr-flow for a non-destructive migration; persona + doctrine live as transparent files in its own folder.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: handle_message
exposes_rpc.description: Handle one chat message through the loket: recall brain, inject doctrine + persona + real time, complete via the LLM service, remember the exchange.

exposes_rpc.name: boot
exposes_rpc.description: No-op for now (no daemon). Telegram will arrive via a separate channel module in a later migration phase.
